description: Style NoteMixing classic natural prints with a hint of the exotic (nailing the latest summer trend) colour block this top from Tonga with for an effortlessly breezy vibe. For winter, you can smarten this up by layering it with a pastel toned cardi or a colour pop blazer. Product DetailsWhite strappy top with smocking on the chest abd back chest (with embroidery) and ruched detail at the shoulder strapsMaterial and Care94% rayon, 6% spandexHandwashDo not bleachHang to drySize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
